### Top forum threads [...] Fred Davis

This Nonilion sounds super cool! I can totally relate to the Google Meet chaos. When multiple people share screens or talk over each other, it's a madhouse. The idea of an immersive, distraction-free platform with games and custom characters is genius. How do you think it'll fare against other popular meeting tools in the long run?

Krishna Krishna
Nonilion

Nonilion

@fred\_davis5 Hi, thank you for the compliments. I believe if Nonilion becomes a unicorn or a multi-billion dollar company, then we will sponsor all the other meetings platform, and try be their friends haha :)
